name: mcp-sophon
description: Honest token economics for MCP agents. Deterministic context layer: prompt compression, conversation memory, code navigation, file delta, output compression. Single Rust binary, zero ML at query time, reproducible benchmarks. 68% session tokens saved on 25-turn agent session, 70% mean prompt compression at 36 ms, code retrieval recall@3 70% (vs grep 10%), p99 < 87 ms on 5/7 ops. Beats LLMLingua-2 by +8.9 pts at 35x lower latency; ties mem0 on LOCOMO at sub-second vs 8.7 min.
author: Sophon Contributors
